issues.description: RevealFromHand is a cost/requirement, not the main action. The primary effect is placing a Character at the bottom of deck, which requires SearchDeck or a custom placement action. Current DSL is missing the core effect entirely.
thenActions array is empty. Must contain the action to place up to 1 Character (cost ≤6) at bottom of deck after revealing 2 Whitebeard Pirates cards.
Filter uses 'subType' but card text says 'type including Whitebeard Pirates'. Should be 'type' not 'subType' for broader type matching.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 6 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.
